name: Light Crab Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop onion in a food chopper.
2. Press garlic.
3. Mix the chopped onion with cheese and milk.
4. Spread the mixture into mini bakers.
5. Chop and mix the remaining ingredients: tomato, pepper, parsley, and lemon juice.
6. Spoon the mixture on top of the cheese layer.
7. Top with crab meat and sprinkle with parsley.
8. Chill and serve with Valtrompia Bread slices or fresh vegetables.
